text.title: PR Time + Cost Diff Tool Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to set up the PR-time cost-diff checker end-to-end.

step.name: freeze-eval-set
step.action: Select ≥20 representative requests; commit as `eval/pr-cost.jsonl`; record SHA in CI workflow.
step.output: Frozen eval set with stable hash.
step.decision-gate: If no eval set can be built, STOP — methodology cannot apply.

step.name: version-cost-table
step.action: Commit `cost-table.yaml` with per-model $/1k input + $/1k output + p50 latency baseline; tag with `cost_table_version`.

step.name: implement-checker
step.action: Implement replay script: load PR diff; if it touches prompts/model/context/budget, replay eval set on base + head; compute three deltas + eval pass-rate delta.

step.name: wire-pr-comment
step.action: Post `cost-report.md` as PR comment using GitHub API; mark check as `fail` if budget breached.

step.name: validate-and-block
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-pr-time-cost-diff-tool.py --file report.json`; require the check in branch protection.
step.output: Validator exit 0; merge blocked on budget breach.
